job_summary: A Pharmacovigilance CRA focuses on monitoring drug safety within clinical trials and post- marketing phases.
key_responsibilities: Monitor adverse events (AEs) and serious adverse events (SAEs)
Perform safety data review and signal detection
Ensure timely safety reporting to authorities
Ensure compliance with global safety regulations
career_path: PV CRA → Drug Safety Scientist → PV Manager
skills_required: ensure compliance with global safety regulations
ensure timely safety reporting to authorities
monitor adverse events (aes) and serious adverse events (saes)
perform safety data review and signal detection
